caption:
🌃 Neon rain slicked the chrome alleyway, dripping down my synthetic leather jacket as I navigated the district. Tonight, I wasn't just a face in the crowd; I was the prize. My suit felt like a second skin, engineered to move with me while keeping secrets safe beneath the fabric. Every step echoed with confidence. The target was a rogue data broker, but the price was higher than credits.

He found me in a mirror-lined room, his eyes glowing blue like a predator’s. I adjusted the collar of my holo-sequined bodysuit, feeling the tension in my thighs. The air hummed with the charge of our proximity. "You're closer than you think," I murmured, my voice modulated to a low hum.

He reached out, fingers brushing the strap of my suit. Sparks danced between us, electricity crackling in the static-filled room. I leaned into the heat, letting the fabric stretch just enough to hint at what lay beneath. Every step I took felt like a heartbeat against the rhythm of the city. I was a weapon of desire and tech.

#Cyberpunk #NeonNights #FutureFashion #TechSiren #NightLife
